description_long: This is a portable, diamond-shaped caution sign with a bright orange reflective surface and the word 'CAUTION' printed in bold black letters. The sign is supported by a collapsible, X-shaped metal frame that allows it to stand upright on flat surfaces. The frame consists of four tubular legs that spread out for stability, and a central vertical pole that holds the sign panel. The sign panel appears to be made of a flexible, weather-resistant material, likely vinyl or plastic, designed to withstand outdoor conditions. The rear of the sign is plain, showing the reverse side of the orange material without any text or symbols. This type of sign is commonly used for temporary warnings in construction zones, roadwork areas, or other locations requiring heightened awareness.
description: A portable, diamond-shaped orange caution sign with a collapsible X-frame stand and bold black lettering, designed for temporary roadside or construction use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange diamond sign with 'CAUTION' in black letters and the full X-frame base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the sign and the tubular support pole, with the X-frame legs visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain orange back of the sign and the X-frame base, with no visible text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the X-frame legs from the other side.
attribute_location_context: urban roadside, construction zone, or temporary work area
